---
title: "References"
---

If you use `saguiSED`, cite the SED-fitting backend you used, the segmentation
package that produced the regional photometry, and the relevant method papers.

## Method papers

### sagui

de Souza, R. S. et al. (2026). **SAGUI: SED-based Segmentation of
Multi-band Galaxy Images -- Application to JADES in GOODS-South**.
arXiv:2604.18812. <https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2604.18812>

### capivara

de Souza, R. S. et al. (2025). **capivara: a spectral-based segmentation
method for IFU data cubes**. *Monthly Notices of the Royal Astronomical
Society*, 539(4), 3166--3179. <https://doi.org/10.1093/mnras/staf688>

### Bagpipes

Carnall, A. C., McLure, R. J., Dunlop, J. S., & Davé, R. (2018).
**Inferring the star formation histories of massive quiescent galaxies with
BAGPIPES: evidence for multiple quenching mechanisms**. *Monthly Notices of
the Royal Astronomical Society*, 480(4), 4379--4401.
<https://doi.org/10.1093/mnras/sty2169>

For installation and backend-specific citation guidance, see the
[Bagpipes documentation](https://bagpipes.readthedocs.io/en/latest/).

## Suggested BibTeX

```bibtex
@misc{sagui2026,
  author = {de Souza, Rafael S. and others},
  title = {{SAGUI}: {SED}-based Segmentation of Multi-band Galaxy Images --
           Application to {JADES} in {GOODS}-South},
  year = {2026},
  eprint = {2604.18812},
  archivePrefix = {arXiv},
  primaryClass = {astro-ph.IM},
  doi = {10.48550/arXiv.2604.18812}
}

@article{capivara2025,
  author = {de Souza, Rafael S. and others},
  title = {capivara: a spectral-based segmentation method for {IFU} data cubes},
  journal = {Monthly Notices of the Royal Astronomical Society},
  volume = {539},
  number = {4},
  pages = {3166--3179},
  year = {2025},
  doi = {10.1093/mnras/staf688}
}

@article{bagpipes2018,
  author = {Carnall, A. C. and McLure, R. J. and Dunlop, J. S. and Dav{\'e}, R.},
  title = {Inferring the star formation histories of massive quiescent galaxies
           with {BAGPIPES}: evidence for multiple quenching mechanisms},
  journal = {Monthly Notices of the Royal Astronomical Society},
  volume = {480},
  number = {4},
  pages = {4379--4401},
  year = {2018},
  doi = {10.1093/mnras/sty2169}
}
```

When `saguiSED` receives a software DOI, cite that DOI in addition to the method
and backend papers above.
